The '''''Walerv''''' was a [[DP20 gunship/Legends|DP20 gunship]] in the service of the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]].

It fought at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], and shortly afterward at the [[Invasion of Bakura]] as part of the [[Bakura task force]]. It was the only ship sent to [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] with a primarily non-[[Human/Legends|Human]] crew (including seventeen [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]]).

==Appearances==
*''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' {{1st}}
